SageTVPlugin.Name: PlayOn Cloud Integration
SageTVPlugin.Description: Automatically downloads completed recordings from your PlayOn Cloud account into SageTV's media library with full metadata mapping. Compatible with SageTV V9.x (Java 8) and SageTV-mine (Java 21). Similar to Channels DVR's PlayOn integration — poll for completed cloud recordings, download MP4 files, and import them with proper series/episode/movie metadata.
SageTVPlugin.Author: galeforcesage
SageTVPlugin.ReleaseNotes: 1.0.0 - Initial release - PlayOn Cloud account authentication (email/password with encrypted storage) - Automatic polling for completed cloud recordings (configurable 30min–24hr interval) - Sequential MP4 download with resume support - SageTV metadata sidecar files (.properties) for library import - File organization: ServiceName/ShowName/ShowName_S01E01_EpisodeName.mp4 - Download tracking to prevent re-downloads - Optional removal of recordings from PlayOn Cloud after download - Configurable via SageTV Plugin Manager UI
